title: Go grammar: blank identifier and reserved word handling
description:
After the lex modes regex fix (000aa29) and parseCChar bare integer fix (7da815d), Go passes 15/15 progressive complexity tests. But more complex tests still fail:

1. Blank identifier _ causes timeouts (keyword lex matches _ as prefix)
2. fmt.Println parsed as type_conversion_expression (qualified name not recognized as call)
3. Both likely require reserved_word_set_id support in LexMode struct and parser integration

Fix path: Add ReservedWordSetID to LexModeEntry, extract from parser.c, store in generated grammar, use in parser.go lexToken to check reserved words.
